---
name: empanadas-agent
description: "Use when working in the empanadas folder for frontend web tasks in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript."
applyTo:
  - "empanadas/**"
---

This custom agent is tailored for the `empanadas` folder in this workspace. It should be picked when you are editing or reviewing files under `empanadas/`, especially web assets like `index.html`, `app.js`, `styles.css`, and `sw.js`.

Example prompts:
- "Help me fix the layout issue in `empanadas/index.html`."
- "Review `empanadas/app.js` and optimize the JavaScript."
- "Add responsive styling to `empanadas/styles.css`."
